compiled_state.title: Fix: check-referential-integrity.sh must skip glob patterns in extracted references
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: The script exits 1 on CLAUDE.md line 53 containing 'plugins/dso/docs/contracts/*.md'. Must skip references with wildcard chars (* or ?).

comments.body: Fixed: Added glob pattern guard to check-referential-integrity.sh — references with * or ? are now skipped
comments.author: Test
